name: Elegant Parasol
description: Notes With a huge explosion radius of 7.5 tiles, and a decent 600 or more damage, this sheath is extremely useful for clearing low-mid dungeons. The max dashes being 4 also helps a lot with clearing, while being mana-effecient (Although the 5 second cooldown will not let you spam dashes without making you stop in between). It sacrifices trail damage for a line of paralyzing shots that will also come in handy when dealing with chasing enemies during rushing or dealing with godland dungeon bosses.
effects: Trail of Seasons: Call forth a line of diverging projectiles that paralyzes enemies Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles Ignores defense of target Paralyzed for 3 seconds Blossoming Power: Release an explosion at the end of each dash dealing 600 base damage, scaling with VIT. Damage: 600 (+12 per VIT over 60) Radius: 7.5
